reference: Hi, thank you for asking. I really understand your concern, but you need not worry about it; this is not a sign of cancer for sure. Because you have a family history of cancer, you may be having such negative thoughts. It could be some kind of skin lesion, and it will improve with any local steroid-containing cream. Try it, and forget about the thought of cancer. Have a nice day.
text: Hi, thank you for asking. I really understand your concern, but you need not worry about it. This is not a sign of cancer for sure. Because you have a family history of cancer, you may be having such negative thoughts. It could be some kind of skin lesion, and it will improve with any local steroid-containing cream. Try it, and forget about the thought of cancer. Have a nice day.
